dashboard.title: Federation Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time telemetry and network consensus state.
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to register your own site, upload files, and deploy to the federation network.

chart.title: Federation Activity (24h)
chart.subtitle: Deployments and federation events per hour
chart.noActivity: No activity in the last 24 hours
chart.noActivityHint: Activity will appear here as nodes communicate and sites are deployed

consensus.title: Node Consensus
consensus.subtitle: Live status of all federation nodes

mySites.title: My Sites
mySites.noSitesHint: Register your first site to start hosting on the federation.
mySites.signInPrompt: Sign in to manage your hosted sites and deploy content.

deploy.title: Upload Files
deploy.subtitle: Drop HTML, CSS, JS, images and other assets. Files upload directly to object storage.
deploy.dropzone: Drop files here or click to browse
deploy.dropzoneHint: HTML, CSS, JS, images, fonts · 50 MB per file

preview.title: Site Preview
preview.noIndex: No index.html — site may not load correctly.

history.title: Deployment History
history.rolledBackMsg: Site is now serving the previous version.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.hitsSubtitle: Request count per bucket for the selected period
analytics.topReferrersSubtitle: Where your traffic is coming from
analytics.noData: No traffic data for this period yet.

tokens.title: API Tokens
tokens.subtitle: Long-lived tokens for the CLI and external tools
tokens.noTokensHint: Create a token to authenticate the CLI or external tools.

created.title: Token Created
created.warning: This is the only time this token will be shown. Store it securely.

tokens.revokedMsg: The token is no longer valid.

quickstart.title: FedHost CLI
quickstart.subtitle: Create a token above, then authenticate the CLI in one command.

sections.recentEventsSubtitle: Last 10 events logged by this node

banner.title: Welcome to Federated Hosting
banner.subtitle: Deploy your first site in 4 steps — sign in, register, upload, go live.

signin.title: Sign in
signin.description: Create your account with one click.

register.title: Register a site
register.description: Give your site a name and a domain.

upload.title: Upload your files
upload.description: Drag & drop HTML, CSS, JS and assets.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.description: Go live and replicate across the network.

errors.authRequiredMsg: Sign in to access this page.
